creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Silay is a quaint town in the province of Negros Occidental where heritage houses and historical landmarks are well-preserved. It is also famous for homegrown artists and cultural shows. Thus, people call Silay “The Paris of Negros”, while I call it my HOME. 

✈️ How to get there?
Book a flight to Bacolod and you’ll arrive at Bacolod-Silay Airport, located exactly in Silay City!

📸 Featured in this reel are some of the attractions to include in your Silay travel itinerary:
* Patag
* Silay Public Plaza
* Balay Negrense
* San Diego Pro-Cathedral 
* Heritage Houses along Rizal Street 
* 1898 Heritage House (now a casa and restaurant) 
* Cinco de Noviembre landmark

Save this for your Philippines trip!

transcription.text: My home will ever be a place. My home has the most beautiful face. My home. You're my home.
